### Topic

<!-- Good: "How small teams use GitHub Actions to automate their entire workflow" -->
<!-- Bad: "GitHub Actions" -->

### Content Type

Blog post

### Target Audience

<!-- Who will read this? e.g., developers, executives, general public -->

### Tone

<!-- Professional | Casual | Technical | Persuasive -->
Professional

### Length

<!-- Short (~500 words) | Medium (~1000 words) | Long (~2000+ words) -->
Medium
